Gift Cards

The gift of
expert care

A gift card can be redeemed against any service, package or product across all five locations. Available from GHS 100, with no upper limit.

Choose a specific treatment, a spa package, or leave the amount open so the recipient can decide. Gift cards are valid for 90 days from the date of purchase. Please ensure they are redeemed before the expiry date, as extensions are not routinely granted once expired.

In exceptional circumstances, an extension request may be considered within 30 days of expiry via WhatsApp (0561 11 00 00), subject to an additional fee and valid supporting evidence.

How to purchase

In person

Visit any Niobe location to purchase a physical gift card over the counter. Payment by cash, bank transfer, Visa or mobile money.

Online

Choose a service, package or open amount and make payment below. Forward proof of payment to WhatsApp . Include the payment reference (beginning with PAY_) to link your payment. Upon confirmation, an e-gift card will be emailed directly to the recipient.

International purchases

We accept payment via mobile money using WorldRemit, Sendwave or similar apps.
Telecel: +233 (0) 204 62 62 00  ·  MTN: +233 (0) 242 62 62 00
Name: Niobe Spa / Kofi Labi.
Upon receipt of cleared funds, we can arrange local collection or delivery (at additional cost).

Bank transfer

Account name: Niobe Salon and Spa Ltd
Bank: Zenith Bank · Branch: East Legon
Account: 6011304206
Sort Code: 12-01-09 · SWIFT: ZEBLGHAC

Purchase online

After submitting this form, we will send you payment details by WhatsApp. The e-gift card is issued once payment is confirmed.
